title: Superior
content:
{{Top|ga|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Superior'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' — Based on standard [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] specifics |line= |model= |type=[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Warship/Legends|Warship]] |commission= |destroyed=[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], [[Sartinaynian system]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'', including the ''Superior''{{'s}} destruction in the [[Sartinaynian system]], to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. |retired= |battles=[[Battle of Bastion]] |affiliation=[[Imperial Remnant]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|What's the name of the other Star Destroyer? Do you recognize it?''"
"''It's pretty banged up, but I think it's the ''Superior''.|[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]|}} The '''''Superior''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] belonging to the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Imperial Navy/Legends|naval fleet]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the ''Superior'' participated in the [[Battle of Bastion]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] assaulted the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] in the [[Sartinaynian system]]. Fighting alongside the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] over a [[Sartinaynian system gas giant|gas giant]] in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]], the ''Superior'' was ravaged by the attacks of Yuuzhan Vong [[Starship/Legends|starships]], and its wreck was lost as it fell into the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant's]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. ==Description== As an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], the ''Superior'' measured 1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length and was produced by [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. ==History== [[File:Bastion-FF.jpg|thumb|left|230px|The ''Superior'' was badly damaged during the conflict at Bastion (pictured).]] As of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], the ''Superior'' served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]], which ruled over a region of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. At that [[Time/Legends|time]], [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] was facing the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] invaded the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] in order to conquer it. Although the Yuuzhan Vong initially ignored the Imperial Remnant, in 28 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] the invaders assaulted the [[Sartinaynian system]], which included the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]], in the [[Battle of Bastion]]. During the [[Space warfare/Legends|battle]], after the Imperial forces were forced to retreat from Bastion, the ''Superior'' and the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']], commanded by Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], fought a substantial Yuuzhan Vong group amongst the [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of a [[Sartinaynian system gas giant|gas giant]] in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]]. Although aided by multiple Imperial support vessels, the ''Superior'' and the ''Chimaera'' sustained heavy damage. Due to the Yuuzhan Vong forces arrayed against them, the pair of Star Destroyers could not make it to the planet [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]], where the Imperial Remnant was regrouping. With the ''Superior''{{'s}} [[Hull/Legends|hull]] holed with craters and in [[Fire/Legends|flames]], Pellaeon ordered the [[Warship/Legends|warship's]] evacuation, and a [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] was used to transport the ''Superior''{{'s}} survivors to safety. On its journey to Yaga Minor, the medical [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] escaped the Sartinaynian system unscathed by using the wreckage of the ''Superior'' for cover as the dying Star Destroyer succumbed to the [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] and plunged into its [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Superior'' appeared in [[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant|''Force Heretic I: Remnant'']], a [[2003]] [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] novel written by [[Shane Dix]] and [[Sean Williams]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Superior |es=Superior }} [[Category:Imperial-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of the Imperial Remnant]]
